articles.title: India news: Myanmar president arrives in Delhi to boost ties
articles.excerpt: Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing is on a five-day visit to India where he will hold talks with Indian PM Narendra Modi. Meanwhile, Karnataka is readying itself for a Cabinet change. Follow DW for more.
